topic: Absolute Value Inequalities and Their Applications

questions.question: Graph the solution set of $|x + 2| geq 4$ on a number line.
Express the solution set of $|3x - 2| > 5$ in interval notation.
A stock's price changed by $|2x - 5|$ dollars. If the price change was between $$2$ and $$8$, find the possible values of $x$.
A savings account earns interest of $|0.05x - 100|$ dollars per year. Find the values of $x$ for which the interest earned is between $$20$ and $$50$.
The tax on a stock investment is $|0.1x - 50|$ dollars. Find the values of $x$ for which the tax paid is less than $$20$.
The distance between two cities is $|x - 200|$ miles. Find the values of $x$ for which the distance is greater than 50 miles.
A company's profit is $|0.2x - 150|$ dollars. Find the values of $x$ for which the profit is greater than $$50$.

Model the situation where a stock's price increased by $|1.5x - 20|$ dollars and decreased by $|0.8x - 15|$ dollars. Find the values of $x$ for which the net change in the stock's price is between $$10$ and $$30$. Provide your solution in interval notation.

A bank account earns $|0.03x - 10|$ dollars interest per month, but is charged $|0.02x - 5|$ dollars in fees. Find the values of $x$ for which the net interest earned is greater than $$15$. Graph your solution set on a number line and express it in interval notation.

teacher_rules: Ensure students understand the concept of absolute value inequalities.
Remind students to consider both cases when solving absolute value inequalities.
Emphasize the importance of expressing solutions in interval notation and graphing on a number line.
